form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up got back early finished eighth of 11 runners at Southwell All Weather on February 20 over 2400m, 7 len behind Wonder carrying 60.5kg at $67. Last start finished seventh of 10 starters at Southwell on March 24 over 4100m, 33 len behind Codetalker carrying 72.5kg at $51. Making headway every start. Sure to prove harder to beat this time.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up pulled up at Uttoxeter on January 24 over 4000m. Last start ran last at Wetherby on March 17 over 3880m, 52 len behind Rath Gaul Hill carrying 70.5kg at $51. Disappointing again last time and others rate better.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Returned from a spell and eased out of it in a steeplechase at Wetherby. At only start last preparation finished fifth in a small field at Musselburgh on February 16 2025 over 4700m, 15 len behind Red Happy with 72.5kg at $3.80. Forgive first-up failure. Fitter and will prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Last start finished third of 11 runners at this track on March 19 over 4200m, 12 len behind Valence D'aumont carrying 75.5kg at $5. Run before pulled up at Market Rasen on February 17 over 3830m. Progressing well this campaign. Course and distance winner who can turn things around.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming finished eighth of 12 starters at Doncaster on February 27 over 3900m, 74 len behind Diamond Koda carrying 75.5kg at $41. form.formComment: Last outing finished fourth of 11 runners at Exeter on March 17 over 4800m, 46 len behind Dyno Dave carrying 67kg at $15. Start before finished fifth of 7 starters at Leicester on February 24 over 4500m, on slow going 56 len behind Delgany Deadline carrying 73kg at $12. Continues to improve. Cannot be left out in this more suitable contest.

form.formComment: Resuming after three months. Finished off last campaign 10 of 11 runners at Warwick December 31 over 3800m, 51 len behind Following Chapter carrying 71kg at $12. Previously first up; 4 of 7 starters at Leicester November 17 over 4100m, slow track; 6 len behind Jewel Eyed Judy carrying 74kg at $4.50. Presents a serious threat.
